rationale.R1.1: Artifact makes a multi-part contribution claim (gap + CommDiag + four taxa + empirical instantiation); reconstructing whether these claims form a coherent thesis is foundational to any meaningful review.
rationale.R1.2: The argument chain (gap → taxonomy → detectors → 87% coverage → cross-architecture comparison) has multiple inference steps that could break; consistency checking is central to 'take a look' on a research excerpt.
rationale.R1.3: Specific empirical assertions are made (240 traces, 87% failure coverage, role-bleed 42% vs 6%) — verifying these align with the stated experimental design is a natural load for a research review.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is a plausible primary interpretation of 'take a look at this paragraph' in a research writing context, making sentence/paragraph quality a candidate load-bearing dimension.

parsed.clarification_question: Are you looking for feedback on the scientific argument — i.e., whether the logic, evidence, and claims hold up — or on the writing and presentation quality of the prose itself?
